---
title: "Figure 4"
author: "SK"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::robobook:
    highlight: kate
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(reshape2)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(cellmig)
dir.create("manuscript_dataset_1")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```



```{r}
o <- get(load("results/cellmig_dataset_1.RData"))
```

```{r}
u <- get_pairs(x = o, exponentiate = T)
ds <- u$ds

ds$dose <- factor(x = ds$dose, levels = c("2.5", "5", "10", "40", "control", "high"))
ds$compound <- factor(x = ds$compound, levels = c("Fluvastatin", "CK666", 
                                                  "CK869", "Benproperine", "Haloperidol", 
                                                  "DMSO", "Pitavastatin", "Pravastatin"))

# factors for x/y-axis
srt <- c("Fluvastatin|2.5", "Fluvastatin|5", "Fluvastatin|10",
         "CK666|5", "CK666|10", "CK666|40", 
         "CK869|5", "CK869|10", 
         "Benproperine|5", "Benproperine|10", 
         "Haloperidol|5", "Haloperidol|10", 
         "DMSO|high",
         "Pitavastatin|2.5", "Pitavastatin|5", "Pitavastatin|10",
         "Pravastatin|2.5", "Pravastatin|5", "Pravastatin|10")

ds$group_x <- factor(x = ds$group_x, levels = srt)
ds$group_y <- factor(x = ds$group_y, levels = srt)

ds$group_comparison <- paste0(ds$group_x, '-', ds$group_y)
```



```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5.5}
g_rho <- ggplot(data = ds)+
  geom_tile(aes(y = group_x, x = group_y, fill = rho_M_exp), col = "white")+
  geom_text(aes(y = group_x, x = group_y, label = round(x = rho_M_exp, digits = 1)), size = 2)+
  scale_fill_distiller(name = expression(rho*"'"), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 4), palette = "Spectral")+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  xlab(label = 'to treatment')+
  ylab(label = 'from treatment')+
  guides(fill = guide_colourbar(barwidth = 5, barheight = 0.8))

g_rho
```


```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=4.5}
g_pi <- ggplot(data = ds)+
  geom_tile(aes(y = group_x, x = group_y, fill = pmax), col = "white")+
  geom_text(aes(y = group_x, x = group_y, label = round(x = pmax, digits = 1)), size = 2)+
  scale_fill_gradient(name = expression(pi), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 4), 
                      low = "white", high = "darkgray")+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  xlab(label = 'to treatment')+
  ylab(label = 'from treatment')+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  guides(fill = guide_colourbar(barwidth = 5, barheight = 0.8))

g_pi
```

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
g <- (g_rho|g_pi)+patchwork::plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
g
```

```{r}
ggsave(filename = "manuscript_dataset_1/Figure_4.pdf",
       plot = g,
       device = "pdf",
       width = 8,
       height = 4.75)
```
